title: Foxys Space Mission
description: Foxys Spaces Mission – Blast off into space, explore epic dungeons, and build across worlds. Tech, adventure, and galaxies await.
body:
# 🪐 Foxys Space Mission 🚀  
**Version:** Minecraft 1.20.4 (Fabric)  
**Modloader:** Fabric  

## 🌌 Description  
**Foxys Spaces Mission** is an adventurous space-themed modpack that takes you from the Earth to the stars!  
Explore distant planets, master futuristic tech, and build your own galactic empire — all within a carefully curated blend of space, exploration, and quality-of-life mods.

Whether you're launching rockets into orbit, uncovering ancient temples, or living in sci-fi cities with friends, this modpack offers a truly epic and immersive Minecraft experience.

## 🚀 Key Features  
- **Ad Astra + Addons** – Travel to space, build stations, and explore alien worlds.  
- **Star Wars Planets** – Visit iconic locations from the Star Wars universe.  
- **Minecraft Transit Railway** – Connect cities and bases with advanced rail systems.  
- **Exploration Mods (YUNG’s, Explorify, Better Nether/End)** – Revamp every dimension with new dungeons, structures, and secrets.  
- **Performance & QoL** – Smooth gameplay with Sodium, Lithium, Indium, dynamic lights, improved UI, and smart tweaks.  
- **Adventure & Survival Enhancements** – Gliders, smarter mobs, visual improvements, and deep progression.

## 🎮 Multiplayer Ready  
Includes **Simple Voice Chat** and **Open Parties and Claims** for seamless co-op play.

## 📦 Notable Mods  
Ad Astra, Star Wars Planets, Minecraft Transit Railway, Better Nether, Better End, YUNG’s Better Dungeons & Structures, Sodium, Lithium, Elytra Aeronautics, Tom's Simple Storage, Jade, Xaero’s Maps, and many more.
